mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.bao_id AS "baoId", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.money AS "money", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.sex AS "u.sex",
`group`.name AS "group.name", `group`.idno AS "group.idno"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_group `group` ON `group`.id = a.group_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_group_hongbao_log( id, uid, bao_id, group_id, money, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{baoId}, #{group.id}, #{money}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_group_hongbao_log SET uid = #{u.id}, bao_id = #{baoId}, group_id = #{group.id}, money = #{money}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
